fix: return null instead of throwing in getSession to prevent SSR failure

Throwing errors in beforeLoad causes TanStack Start SSR to fail silently,
resulting in empty matches array and blank pages. Critical prod bug.

chore: update TanStack router/start to 1.145.11

Fixes SSR route matching cache issues

fix: use correct hookSpecificOutput format for PreToolUse

Claude Code requires:
- hookSpecificOutput wrapper
- permissionDecision: 'allow' (not 'decision: approve')
- hookEventName: 'PreToolUse'

This enables the updatedInput to actually modify the git commit command.

then get user prompts since that point. Survives restarts.

fix: remove router instance caching to prevent HMR blank pages

TanStack Start requires getRouter() to return a fresh instance each time.
The cached singleton was causing stale route trees during dev/HMR,
leading to blank pages with empty matches array.

Ref: https://tanstack.com/start/latest/docs/framework/react/guide/routing
Ref: https://github.com/TanStack/router/issues/902

perf: optimize PreToolUse hook for large tool inputs

- Add fast path that checks first 2KB of stdin before parsing full JSON
- Skip JSON parsing entirely for non-git-commit PreToolUse events
- Remove prompt collection from commit messages (no longer reads transcript)
- Remove dead code: collectCommitPrompts, readTranscriptEntries, etc.

This fixes slowdowns when Claude uses tools with large payloads (e.g.,
Write with 800KB file content) since the hook no longer needs to parse
the entire input for every tool invocation.

shared: Use recorded gitBranch instead of reading from disk

The converter was reading the current .git/HEAD from disk and only
using the recorded gitBranch as a fallback. This caused the unified
transcript to show the wrong branch if the repo was on a different
branch when the transcript was converted.

Now prioritizes the recorded gitBranch from the original transcript,
only falling back to disk read when gitBranch wasn't recorded.
